productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Statements Black Passport Holder
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this passport holder from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed international male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your passport with ease in this classic piece.Dimensions: 14 cm X 9.7 cmHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on the right side of the walletTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideAn id holder on the left sideTwo card holders on the rightBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
